_comment: Master item catalog for Rune Realms. All items that can drop from enemies or appear in inventory.

items.name: Goblin Bones
items.description: Brittle bones from a defeated goblin. Useful for prayer training.

items.name: Bronze Dagger
items.description: A small dagger made of bronze. Not very sharp, but better than nothing.

items.name: Feather
items.description: A soft feather. Used in fletching and fly fishing.

items.name: Raw Chicken
items.description: A raw piece of chicken meat. Cook it before eating.

items.name: Egg
items.description: A freshly laid egg. Surprisingly intact after the battle.

items.name: Bones
items.description: A pile of bones. Can be buried for prayer experience.

items.name: Iron Sword
items.description: A sturdy sword forged from iron. A reliable weapon for any adventurer.

items.name: Shield Half
items.description: Half of an ancient shield. Find the other half to forge a legendary defense.

items.name: Air Rune
items.description: A rune imbued with the power of air. Used to cast wind spells.

items.name: Wizard Hat
items.description: A pointy hat favored by practitioners of the arcane arts.

items.name: Staff of Fire
items.description: A magical staff crackling with flame. Provides unlimited fire runes.

items.name: Spider Silk
items.description: Strong, sticky silk harvested from a giant spider. Used in crafting.

items.name: Venom Sac
items.description: A sac of potent spider venom. Handle with extreme care.

items.name: Big Bones
items.description: Oversized bones from a hill giant. Worth more prayer XP than regular bones.

items.name: Giant Key
items.description: A massive brass key. Rumored to unlock a chest deep within Obor's lair.

items.name: Rune Helm
items.description: A full helm forged from runite. Offers excellent protection.

items.name: Limpwurt Root
items.description: A gnarly root used in herblore to brew strength potions.

items.name: Black Platebody
items.description: Dark plate armor worn by the knights of the Black Order.

items.name: Black Sword
items.description: A jet-black longsword. Its edge never seems to dull.

items.name: Knight's Shield
items.description: A kite shield bearing the crest of a fallen knight order.

items.name: Dragon Bones
items.description: Ancient bones from a slain dragon. Extremely valuable for prayer training.

items.name: Dragon Hide
items.description: Tough, scaly hide from a dragon. Can be crafted into powerful armor.

items.name: Dragon Scimitar
items.description: A curved blade of dragonfire-tempered metal. The weapon of champions.

items.name: Dragon Visage
items.description: An extremely rare dragon face plate. Can be attached to an anti-dragon shield.

items.name: Dragonfire Shield
items.description: A legendary shield that absorbs dragonfire. One of the rarest items in the realm.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: A vial of red liquid that restores 25 HP when consumed.

items.name: Super Health Potion
items.description: A potent healing brew that restores 50 HP when consumed.

items.name: Strength Potion
items.description: A bubbling potion that boosts damage by 20% for 30 seconds.

items.name: XP Lamp
items.description: A magical lamp that grants 100 XP to a skill of your choosing when rubbed.
